utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Hi , could we get two burritos to go , please ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_could we get two burritos to go , please ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: But not that sorry , cause you do not have to live with it .

utterances.text: Um , we have a reservation under the name Chandler Bing .

utterances.text: Oh ... kay , we will have a table for you in about 45 minutes .

utterances.text: Forty ... five minutes ? We have tickets to the Musicman at 8 : 00 .

utterances.text: Is this because of the burrito thing ?
